fraud-sim

per-card-merchant amount zscore + is_new_merchant_for_card, velocity gap IQR/max, weekly txn spikiness
Experiments: 12
Kept: 5
Discarded: 7
Best AUPRC (val): 0.6645
Best AUPRC (OOT): 0.6912
Baseline (OOT): 0.4985
Improvement: +38.7%
